title: gluta curtisii
intro: Gluta curtisii, also known as the Malayan ironwood, is a large tree species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia, Indonesia, and the Philippines. The Malayan ironwood has been valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gluta curtisii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various health conditions such as diabetes and digestive issues. Gluta curtisii is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits.
